summary.key_theme: Meta 正積極透過 AI 轉型與訂閱制服務尋求營收多元化，但同時面臨內部員工對數據隱私的反彈及裁員帶來的營運壓力。

bullish.title: Meta Pushes AI And Subscription Revenue To Diversify Beyond Ads
bullish.reason: 公司推出全球訂閱制服務並擴大 AI 應用，顯示其降低對廣告業務依賴的策略進展，直接推動股價上漲。

bullish.title: Meta Platforms upgraded, Okta downgraded: Wall Street's top analyst calls
bullish.reason: 獲得華爾街分析師上調評級，反映市場對其長期成長潛力與 AI 變現能力的信心。

bullish.title: Is Meta Platforms (META) One of the Best Stocks to Buy Now for Long Term Growth?
bullish.reason: 被列為長期成長型投資的首選標的之一，強化了機構投資人對其基本面的正面評價。

bullish.title: Nvidia, Meta and Schlumberger rank among top companies in adopting AI, new study says
bullish.reason: 研究顯示 Meta 在 AI 採用率上名列前茅，有助於鞏固其在科技產業的競爭優勢。

bullish.title: Cheap Stocks, Nervous Market, Big Opportunity: Where to Put $10,000 Right Now
bullish.reason: 在市場波動環境下被視為資金避風港與成長機會，有利於維持股價支撐。

bullish.title: META Expands Teen Safety Controls Globally, Tests New Instagram Feed Tool
bullish.reason: 透過強化青少年安全控制措施，有助於緩解監管壓力並提升品牌形象。

bearish.title: Meta Employee Backlash Puts AI Data Privacy And Investor Risks In Focus
bearish.reason: 員工對公司收集電腦使用數據以訓練 AI 的計畫產生強烈反彈，引發數據隱私與企業治理的風險擔憂。

bearish.title: Meta reveals details about layoffs in Playa Vista and Menlo Park
bearish.reason: 持續的裁員行動雖然有助於削減成本，但也反映出公司在營運效率與組織架構上的調整壓力。

bearish.title: Meta has struggled at selling anything other than ads. Will AI be different?
bearish.reason: 質疑公司過去在廣告以外業務的獲利能力，對 AI 轉型的長期成效持保留態度。

bearish.title: META Stock Still Trails Mag 7 Peers Even After New Subscriptions, Layoffs, Cloud Plans
bearish.reason: 指出即便有新策略，股價表現仍落後於其他科技巨頭（Mag 7），顯示市場對其成長動能仍有疑慮。

bearish.title: Exclusive-Meta scales back plan for internal mouse-tracking tech, citing staff concerns
bearish.reason: 因員工壓力而縮減監控技術，顯示公司在推動內部 AI 監控計畫時面臨執行阻力。

bearish.title: UBS joins Meta in sending shocking message to employees
bearish.reason: 將 Meta 的內部管理風格與銀行業的危機處理相提並論，對企業文化與員工士氣產生負面聯想。

neutral.title: These Two Techs From Hot Industry Hit Key Levels. One Is A Google, Meta Supplier.
neutral.reason: 提及供應鏈廠商的股價表現，對 Meta 本身股價無直接影響。

neutral.title: Micron Just Surpassed $1.16 Trillion Valuation How Long Before It Tops Meta?
neutral.reason: 僅為市值排名的比較，不涉及 Meta 的基本面變化。

neutral.title: Western Union, Visa, PayPal, Meta: why major payments giants are racing to Solana
neutral.reason: 探討區塊鏈技術應用，屬於產業趨勢觀察，對短期股價影響有限。

neutral.title: OpenAI's Sam Altman Is Reportedly Backing A Little-Known Startup That Wants To Bring AI Into The Physical World
neutral.reason: 提及前員工創業，對 Meta 現有業務無實質影響。

neutral.title: Former Meta CTO Says Industrial Robotics Will Scale Faster Than Home Robots
neutral.reason: 前高管對機器人產業的個人觀點，不代表公司立場。

neutral.title: Here Are Tuesday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls
neutral.reason: 僅列出分析師報告清單，未提供具體影響細節。

neutral.title: Meta Expands Teen Safety Controls Globally
neutral.reason: 與另一篇青少年安全新聞重複，此處歸類為中性資訊更新。

neutral.title: 'Meta Rolls Back Parts of Employee Tracking Tool After Staff Backlash' - The Information
neutral.reason: 與員工監控反彈新聞重複，此處作為資訊來源備註。
